azure-service-bus-messaging:config.name: Azure_Service_Bus_Messaging_Connector_Config
azure-service-bus-messaging:config.doc:name: Azure Service Bus Messaging Connector Config

until-successful.doc:name: Until Successful, if any object store limits

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var header = payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader var lead = payload.data.payload var replayId = payload.data.event.replayId as String --- header.recordIds map (recordId) -> { sfId: recordId, firstName: lead.Name.FirstName, lastName: lead.Name.LastName, email: lead.Email, phone: lead.Phone, company: lead.Company, status: lead.Status, leadSource: lead.LeadSource, changeType: header.changeType, changeOrigin: header.changeOrigin, replayId: replayId, createdDate: lead.CreatedDate, lastModifiedDate: lead.LastModifiedDate }

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO leads ( sf_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, company, status, lead_source, change_type, change_origin, replay_id, created_date, last_modified_date ) VALUES ( :sfId, :firstName, :lastName, :email, :phone, :company, :status, :leadSource, :changeType, :changeOrigin, :replayId, :createdDate, :lastModifiedDate ) ON CONFLICT(sf_id) DO UPDATE SET first_name = COALESCE(excluded.first_name, first_name), last_name = COALESCE(excluded.last_name, last_name), email = COALESCE(excluded.email, email), phone = COALESCE(excluded.phone, phone), company = COALESCE(excluded.company, company), status = COALESCE(excluded.status, status), lead_source = COALESCE(excluded.lead_source, lead_source), change_type = excluded.change_type, change_origin = excluded.change_origin, replay_id = excluded.replay_id, last_modified_date = COALESCE(excluded.last_modified_date, last_modified_date), synced_at = datetime('now') WHERE excluded.last_modified_date > leads.last_modified_date OR (excluded.last_modified_date = leads.last_modified_date AND CAST(excluded.replay_id AS INTEGER) > CAST(leads.replay_id AS INTEGER)) OR leads.last_modified_date IS NULL

logger.message: #[output text --- 'Lead upserted - sfId: ' ++ payload.sfId ++ ' changeType: ' ++ payload.changeType ++ ' affected rows: ' ++ vars.insertResponse.affectedRows]

until-successful.doc:name: Until Successful, if any object store limits

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var header = payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader var opp = payload.data.payload var replayId = payload.data.event.replayId as String --- header.recordIds map (recordId) -> { sfId: recordId, opportunityName: opp.Name, amount: opp.Amount, stageName: opp.StageName, closeDate: opp.CloseDate, probability: opp.Probability, accountId: opp.AccountId, ownerId: opp.OwnerId, "type": opp.Type, leadSource: opp.LeadSource, currencyIsoCode: opp.CurrencyIsoCode, description: opp.Description, changeType: header.changeType, changeOrigin: header.changeOrigin, replayId: replayId, createdDate: opp.CreatedDate, lastModifiedDate: opp.LastModifiedDate }

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO opportunities ( sf_id, opportunity_name, amount, stage_name, close_date, probability, account_id, owner_id, type, lead_source, currency_iso_code, description, change_type, change_origin, replay_id, created_date, last_modified_date ) VALUES ( :sfId, :opportunityName, :amount, :stageName, :closeDate, :probability, :accountId, :ownerId, :type, :leadSource, :currencyIsoCode, :description, :changeType, :changeOrigin, :replayId, :createdDate, :lastModifiedDate ) ON CONFLICT(sf_id) DO UPDATE SET opportunity_name = COALESCE(excluded.opportunity_name, opportunity_name), amount = COALESCE(excluded.amount, amount), stage_name = COALESCE(excluded.stage_name, stage_name), close_date = COALESCE(excluded.close_date, close_date), probability = COALESCE(excluded.probability, probability), account_id = COALESCE(excluded.account_id, account_id), owner_id = COALESCE(excluded.owner_id, owner_id), type = COALESCE(excluded.type, type), lead_source = COALESCE(excluded.lead_source, lead_source), currency_iso_code = COALESCE(excluded.currency_iso_code, currency_iso_code), description = COALESCE(excluded.description, description), change_type = excluded.change_type, change_origin = excluded.change_origin, replay_id = excluded.replay_id, last_modified_date = COALESCE(excluded.last_modified_date, last_modified_date), synced_at = datetime('now') WHERE excluded.last_modified_date > opportunities.last_modified_date OR (excluded.last_modified_date = opportunities.last_modified_date AND CAST(excluded.replay_id AS INTEGER) > CAST(opportunities.replay_id AS INTEGER)) OR opportunities.last_modified_date IS NULL

logger.message: #[output text --- 'Opportunity upserted - sfId: ' ++ payload.sfId ++ ' changeType: ' ++ payload.changeType ++ ' affected rows: ' ++ vars.insertResponse.affectedRows]
#[output text --- 'Error processing Opportunity CDC event: ' ++ error.description]

db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, sf_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, company, status, lead_source, change_type, change_origin, replay_id, created_date, last_modified_date, synced_at FROM leads

SELECT id, sf_id, opportunity_name, amount, stage_name, close_date, probability, account_id, owner_id, type, lead_source, currency_iso_code, description, change_type, change_origin, replay_id, created_date, last_modified_date, synced_at FROM opportunities
